title: Build a List of Major Web Browsers
description: A description list of five major web browsers built using dl, dt, and dd elements. Each browser gets a term entry with its name and a definition entry describing its origin, developer, and release year.
objectives: Use a description list (dl) to pair terms with their definitions
Use dt for each term and dd for its description
Apply semantic HTML to organize reference-style content

files.name: index.html
files.content:
List of Major Web Browsers

Google Chrome
This is a free web browser developed by Google and first released in 2008.
Firefox
This is a free web browser developed by the Mozilla Corporation and first created in 2004.
Safari
This browser was developed by Apple and is the default browser for iPhone, iPad and Mac devices.
Brave
This is a free web browser first released in 2016 that is based on the Chromium web browser.
Arc
This is a free Chromium based web browser first released in 2023 by The Browser Company.
